libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Use in-process Vert.x HTTP server/WebClient tests rather than external services. For nativeTest on Java 25 with 5.0.1, set runtime system properties `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true`; the existing 5.0.0 scaffold already has this workaround but gates it to 5.0.0.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The artifact contains OAuth2WebClient classes, but `io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2` is optional and not needed for core meaningful WebClient coverage; avoid OAuth2-specific coverage unless adding that dependency deliberately.
Local Gradle/native-image verification remains authoritative for whether the runtime properties fully address the Java 25 native-image run failure.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 resolves to Vert.x 5.0.1 with Netty 4.2.2.Final; normal WebClient coverage can use an in-process Vert.x HTTP server and needs no Docker image or extra required dependency, but Java 25 native runs need the existing Netty unsafe-access runtime properties extended to 5.0.1.
